hero.title: Interface of the Future.
hero.description: Engineering a seamless bridge between your movement and your machine.

experience.title: Your hand is the new cursor.
experience.description: 21-point neural tracking translates sub-millimeter gestures into system execution. Zero hardware, infinite precision.

rainbow.title: Local Speech Engine
rainbow.description: Integrated Kaldi model for high-fidelity dictation. Voice processing executed entirely on local silicon for maximum privacy.

zero_trust.title: Zero-Trust Biometrics
zero_trust.description: Your biometric data never leaves your device. Vision processing is executed in protected memory space, ensuring privacy by architectural design.

system_integration.title: System-Level Integration
system_integration.description: Direct C++ bindings to the OS event loop bypassing standard high-level overhead. Real-time execution at 30fps for a native feel.

footer.description: Transforming vision into the world's most intuitive controller.
footer.copyright: © 2026 GESTO ENGINE // DESIGNED BY BRAULIO CAJAS
